series_metadata.series_title: Safety & Hygiene Injury, Occupational Illness and Accident Statistical Records – Minor Research
series_metadata.series_description: This schedule relates to the collection and compilation of statistical data regarding the cause and prevention of injuries, occupational illnesses and accidents to employees. The Minor Research category consists of data files and results for semi-complex projects (e.g. claim summary analysis according to various categories) requested by a Division of Safety & Hygiene (DSH) manager or safety consultant for the purposes of a presentation or individual department need. These records consist of summary statistical information that is included in presentations to external entities such as Safety Councils, BWC Group Rating Sponsors, business associations, public entities such as counties, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 7 years, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete
